sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, hex_value VARCHAR(10), text_value VARCHAR(10), blob_value BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, hex_value, text_value) VALUES (1, '1a2b', 'abcdef'), (2, 'fcba', 'xyz');
SELECT left(blob '1a2b2c', 3) AS left_blob, hex_value, text_value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT text_value, left(hex_value, 2) AS left_hex, blob left_value FROM test_table, (SELECT blob 'badc' AS left_value) AS b WHERE b.left_value = blob 'bada' OR hex_value = '1a2b';
SELECT id, left(text_value, 5) AS short_text, blob 'bada' AS hex_blob FROM test_table WHERE hex_value = left('abcd', 2) AND id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(LENGTH(left(text_value, 5))) AS total_length, hex_value FROM test_table GROUP BY hex_value HAVING SUM(LENGTH(left(text_value, 5))) <= 10;

SELECT t.id, t.hex_value, left(t.text_value, 2) AS short_text FROM test_table AS t WHERE t.hex_value = left('1100', 2) UNION SELECT t2.id, t2.hex_value, NULL FROM test_table AS t2 WHERE t2.id IS NULL;
SELECT left(t.text_value, 4) AS snippet, COUNT(*) FROM test_table t WHERE LEFT(hex_value, 1) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY left(t.text_value, 4) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT blob left_value, left( (SELECT hex_value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2 AND text_value IS NOT NULL), 3) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE additional_table (data_col BLOB, ref_id INT REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT a.data_col, left(t.text_value, 2) AS excerpt FROM additional_table a JOIN test_table t ON a.ref_id = t.id WHERE left(t.hex_value, 1) = '1';
